subject: Coordination brief: mainecoon activities around Canberra | Nikola Tesla | Q1 review | INIT-1869
body: Following yesterday's call, the mainecoon effort in Canberra needs prompt confirmation. Current status is review with monthly updates owned by delivery. Review dependencies across operations and flag unresolved risks. Confirm owners for each work package and share ETA by end of day. Pablo Picasso seems to disagree with Nikola Tesla on key points due to historical perspectives. Reference initiative INIT-1869. Escalate blockers directly if they affect delivery this week. Tracking tags: review, delivery.
